source.description: IRF member configuration with member priority, stack ports bound to IRF-port, and access VLAN ports

config.description: IRF stacking with member-priority, physical-to-IRF-port binding, and IRF-port-configuration activation
known_issues: IRF is H3C-specific; Cisco VSS/StackWise has different CLI. Translation may produce Cisco stackwise-virtual config

expected_translation.high_level: H3C IRF 无直接 Cisco IOS 等价能力。平台验证器检测到 H3C irf 残留后自动标记为不可部署。翻译结果应不包含 H3C 命令引用。

verification.notes: H3C IRF 堆叠无 Cisco IOS 直接等价。Cisco 平台需 VSS/StackWise（取决于平台），普通 IOS 无法等价。翻译结果应标记 MANUAL_REVIEW 而非硬翻成 Port-channel 或空接口配置。
